notes.zh: 骑乘及上下马过渡（含 5 秒 grace）期间禁用 PlaySystemSound、PlayClipSound、PlayMovieSound。PlaySound 已默认不加载。
notes.en: While mounted or during mount/dismount grace (5s): disable PlaySystemSound, PlayClipSound, and PlayMovieSound. PlaySound is not loaded by default.

notes.zh: 外勤机循环音 grace 期间跳过活跃 SoundData 链表扫描（不再挂起 SetVolume/GetVolume）。
notes.en: During Guideroid mount-loop grace: skip active SoundData list scans (SetVolume/GetVolume stay enabled).
